description: A dark yard piled high with discarded metal, old boots, and rusted cans. Sparks occasionally fly from exposed wires.

W.name: West Pathway
W.description: A heavy metal door leading back to the Noodle Factory.

▓.description: Unstable mountains of compressed scrap metal that loom overhead.

..description: Oil-stained ground littered with sharp metal shavings.

L.name: Lost Lens
L.description: A small metallic compartment buried under a heap of broken gears.

item.name: Magnifying Lens
item.description: A highly polished glass lens that focuses ambient light. Perfect for studying tiny details.

onUse.successMessage: You found a Magnifying Lens! Combined with a frame, it might make a useful tool.

M.name: Metal Heap
M.description: A pile of discarded brass and iron scraps.

item.name: Sturdy Brass Frame
item.description: A heavy frame crafted from antique brass. It has a circular opening in the center.

onUse.successMessage: You salvaged a Sturdy Brass Frame! It looks like a handle or support of some kind.

C.name: Compact Crusher
C.description: A slow-moving piston that periodically crushes heaps of junk.

B.name: Broken Boiler
B.description: An old steam boiler that has cold ash spilling out of its furnace.

E.name: Exit East
E.description: A heavy metal security gate that creaks open just enough to pass.
